Interface ILasToRasterFunctionArguments3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control Las to raster conversion.

[Guid("06287915-7483-424F-A016-C82BC1ACE7BE")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILasToRasterFunctionArguments3 : ILasToRasterFunctionArguments2, ILasToRasterFunctionArguments
